hooks.command:
sh -c '[ -x "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/mast" ] || printf "%s
  %s
  %s
" "mast shim missing from the plugin — the mast Claude Code plugin ships bin/mast and could not find it." "Reinstall: /plugin install mast@mastsystems" "Other:   https://github.com/MastSystems/mast-skills#installation" >&2; exit 0'
